footer.tagline: Modern agricultural solutions for sustainable growth.

about.visionStatement: We are committed to building a strong legacy in agriculture by bringing innovative residue-free solutions that create trust, growth, and prosperity for every partner.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.message: The page you are looking for does not exist or may have been moved.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Start your next agricultural partnership
contact.intro: Our team is ready to help you build a more resilient and profitable crop program. Reach out for an introductory consultation.

contactForm.successMessage: We have received your inquiry and will get back to you shortly.

cropDiscovery.title: Crop Discovery
cropDiscovery.subtitle: Responsive crop planning for growers
cropDiscovery.description: Browse our crop catalog to find information and discover relevant products for each crop type.
cropDiscovery.fallback: Learn more about this crop and its products.

cropDetail.notFoundMessage: The crop you are looking for does not exist.
cropDetail.noProducts: No products listed for this crop yet.

diseaseDiscovery.title: Disease Discovery
diseaseDiscovery.subtitle: Prevent crop loss before it spreads
diseaseDiscovery.description: Browse our disease catalog to identify problems and discover relevant treatments and products.
diseaseDiscovery.fallback: Learn more about this disease and its treatments.

diseaseDetail.notFoundMessage: The disease you are looking for does not exist.

distributor.title: Distributor Locator
distributor.subtitle: Find trusted partners near you
distributor.intro: Locate certified distributors and manage your supply chain with confidence. Our network is built for timely support, reliable inventory, and field-ready delivery.
distributor.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, company, city, or state…
distributor.emptyMessage: Try a different search term or check back later as our network grows.
